content: Install monitoring deps (ping3) + design data models
Backend: Check engine (ICMP, TCP, HTTP, SNMP, DNS) with async runners + retries
Backend: Alert rule evaluator + state machine + notification dispatcher (email/webhook/Slack/Teams)
Backend: Background scheduler that polls monitors at their intervals
Backend: SSE realtime stream + REST endpoints (monitors, alerts, rules, channels, metrics)
Frontend: Live NOC Dashboard with status grid, sparkline charts, active alerts panel, sound option
Frontend: Monitor / Alert Rule / Channel / Alert History pages + sidebar entries
